title: Add isTokenExpired token utils function
description: Create `isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean` in `src/auth/token-utils.ts` that decodes a JWT (without signature verification) and checks if the exp claim indicates the token is expired. Include co-located tests in `src/auth/token-utils.test.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts:15-21 - base64urlEncode/base64urlDecode utility functions for JWT encoding
src/auth/jwt-service.ts:84-89 - decode and exp check pattern using `Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)` and `payload.exp < now`
src/utils/debounce.ts - single-function utility module pattern with co-located test file
src/utils/debounce.test.ts - vitest test structure with describe/it/expect
